description: Configure the bcWebCam application to automatically launch when the Windows user logs in. This is a crucial setup step for unattended kiosk scanning environments. You can achieve this by either (A) creating a valid Windows Shortcut (.lnk) to 'C:\Program Files (x86)\bcWebCam\bcWebCam.exe' inside the user's Startup folder (shell:startup), OR (B) adding a String Value to the Windows Registry 'Run' key (HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run) that points to the bcWebCam executable path. Ensure the path is correct so it successfully launches on boot.
